description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a spacious front driveway leading to a double garage. The exterior features light-colored siding with contrasting shutters and a covered front porch supported by columns. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a landscaped lawn with several trees. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house has a clear division between the garage and living spaces, with the garage attached to one side. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and a paved driveway, with a car parked in front.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, double garage, front porch, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a landscaped lawn and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway with a parked car, covered porch, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain exterior wall, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio seating area, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage roof, driveway, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch supported by columns, flanked by windows and accessed via a paved walkway.
